title: Set 5: The New Art Gallery 🖼️

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: What did you think of the paintings in the main hall?

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: I couldn't really understand what the artist was trying to show.

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: Which of the statues did you find the most impressive?

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: Someone told me that the most expensive painting was stolen last night!

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: If you were a famous artist, what kind of things would you paint?

conversation.speaker: Frank
conversation.text: Would you mind waiting for me while I buy a postcard in the shop?

options.text: To be honest, neither could I. It was very strange.
That can’t be true! There are guards everywhere.
I’d like to, but I’ve already spent all my pocket money.
I'd choose colourful landscapes or perhaps the ocean.
To be honest, some of them were a bit unusual for me.
The one made of blue glass, it looked like a frozen wave.
Not at all. Take as long as you need.
It’s open every day except for Mondays.

explanations_vi: Frank thú nhận không thể hiểu ý nghĩa nghệ sĩ muốn thể hiện, Sophia đồng tình (neither could I) và cũng thấy nó rất lạ (very strange).
Frank hỏi bức tượng (statues) nào ấn tượng nhất, Sophia chỉ bức làm từ kính xanh (blue glass) trông như ngọn sóng đóng băng (frozen wave).
Frank kể bức tranh đắt nhất bị đánh cắp đêm qua, Sophia không tin (That can't be true!) vì có bảo vệ (guards) ở khắp nơi.
Frank hỏi nếu là họa sĩ nổi tiếng thì sẽ vẽ gì, Sophia trả lời là vẽ phong cảnh đầy màu sắc (colorful landscapes) hoặc đại dương (ocean).
Frank hỏi liệu Sophia có phiền đứng đợi cậu mua bưu thiếp không, Sophia bảo Không hề phiền (Not at all. Take as long as you need).
